name: codex-codebank
description: Check Codex banked reset credits and expiry times.

interface.longDescription: Codex Codebank provides a bundled skill and JavaScript utility for checking Codex banked reset credits, expiry times, and usage metadata without printing tokens or raw account identifiers.
defaultPrompt: Check when my Codex banked resets expire.
Set up a morning reminder for my Codex resets.
